name: Beer- Cheese Bits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. Mix the baking mix, cheese, and beer until a soft dough forms; beat vigorously for about 20 strokes.
3. Gently shape the dough into a ball on a floured cloth board.
4. Knead the dough 5 times.
5. Roll the dough into a rectangle measuring 16 x 10 inches.
6. Cut the rectangle into 2-inch squares, then cut each square diagonally in half.
7. Spread melted margarine/butter over the pieces and sprinkle with sesame seeds or poppy seeds.
8. Place the pieces on ungreased cookie sheets.
9. Bake until brown, about 8 minutes.
